metadata.name: Request Change of Address for DMV Records

description: A citizen who has moved needs to update their address on their driver's license and vehicle registration.

nodes.task_description: Identify the citizen and their DMV records.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the citizen's license and registration information.

nodes.task_description: Collect and verify the new address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the new address.

nodes.task_description: Update the address on both the driver's license and all associated vehicle registrations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates all relevant records in the DMV system.
